channel.title: lasthirty
channel.description: I write about how I use python and linux in data science.

item.title: 💭 Darren Burns 🌱 On X: "Here'S An Early Clip Of My New (Work In Progress) App: Posting. It'S An Http Client (Like Postman, Insomnia, Etc) But It Runs Entirely In The Terminal. Keyboard-Centric, Snappy, And Works Over Ssh. It'S Written In Python Using The Textual Framework. Https://T.Co/7Yatztk0Rt Https://T.Co/Wb64Aiw7Fm" / X
item.description: This looks like a sweet tui postman clone. Darren is really rolling with these tui's. Cant wait to see where this one

item.description: ublue-os makes a github template for making your own git repo with actions that build out your own personal ublue iso.
